summary: Defines a virtual camera for 3D rendering. Controls position, rotation, field of view, near/far clipping, and projection type (perspective or orthographic).

key_params.name: fov
key_params.note: Field of view in degrees (perspective mode)

common_gotchas: Default position is at the origin looking down -Z; move it back (positive Z) to see geometry at the origin.
Near plane too close to 0 causes Z-fighting artifacts — keep it as large as your scene allows.
